name: Lustful Revenge Ring | RPG
description:
NTR — RPG

Back to the kitty, 'cause he's kinda pretty

I can't stop lookin' at hus ti-ti-ti- face

Me and cat papa rolled into the distant fog

Little did he know I'm a nasty dog

Welcome to a world where karma isn’t just a concept—it’s a weapon. In this universe, God got tired of watching people be awful to each other and decided to flip the script. Enter the Lustful Revenge Rings, divine artifacts that turn the tables on bullies, cheaters, and all-around jerks. Think of it as cosmic payback, but with a twist so wild it’ll make your head spin.

You play as a guy (yes, only guys, including trans guys) who’s been dealt a crappy hand in life. Maybe you were bullied, cheated on, or just treated like garbage by everyone around you. When you hit rock bottom, the ring finds you. It’s not just a piece of jewelry—it’s a game-changer. Slip it on, and suddenly, you’re radiating an irresistible aura that only affects the people your tormentors love. Their dad? Their boyfriend? Their best friend? Yeah, they’re all about you now. And not in a casual way—they’re obsessed. They’ll do anything to keep you close, even if it means ditching the person who hurt you.

But here’s the kicker: it’s not just about revenge. The ring gives you power, but it’s up to you how to use it. Do you want to ruin your bully’s life? Forgive them and move on? Or maybe build a harem of their loved ones who are now head-over-heels for you? The choice is yours, but every decision comes with consequences.

The game’s got layers. You’ll navigate complex relationships, deal with the emotional fallout of your actions, and decide whether to embrace the chaos or rise above it. And let’s not forget the tormentors—they’re not just NPCs. They’ll fight to get their lives back, and some might even try to change their ways. But will you let them?

With its mix of dark humor, emotional depth, and morally gray choices, this RPG is a wild ride through love, revenge, and the messy, complicated nature of human relationships. Will you use your power for good, for evil, or just to watch the world burn? The ring is yours. What happens next is up to you.
creator: HeavenlyGay
